zh.lifeSummary: 當Katharine de Burgh於1294年出生在愛爾蘭貝爾法斯特時，她的父親Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster35歲，母親Margaret Guines35歲。她於1312年8月5日與Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond在愛爾蘭庫迪 唐格林卡斯特爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1331年11月1日在愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林享年37歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katharine de Burgh于1294年出生在爱尔兰貝爾法斯特时，她的父亲Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster35岁，母亲Margaret Guines35岁。她于1312年8月5日与Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond在爱尔兰庫迪 唐格林卡斯特爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1331年11月1日在爱尔兰迪 本 度布林享年37岁，埋葬在爱尔兰迪 本 度布林。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Burgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the ten English places named Burgh in northern England and East Anglia, or the six named Brough in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire. All these are from Old English burg, burh, Middle English burgh ‘massive earthwork, fortification; manor, borough’. Compare Bury . The placename Burgh is pronounced as borough. The surname Brough arose equally from places now called Burgh and Brough, and is the more common form of the surname in modern Britain, where it is pronounced bruff or broof (/brʊf/). The Scottish surname was probably brought in from Yorkshire. For the surname in Ireland see Burke .

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).
German: variant of   Burk  .

variants.name: Bury
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Bury in Lancashire (now part of Greater Manchester), or from some other similarly named place. The placename comes from the dative case, byrig, of Old English burh ‘fortified place’.

Walloon and French: habitational name from any of several places so named, in Wallonia (Belgium) and Oise (France). The placename is from Buriacum, the name of a Gallo-Roman estate, composed of the personal name Burius + the locative suffix -acum. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
South German: variant of   Buri  .

variants.name: Brough
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various English places called Brough or Burgh. See   Burgh  .
Scottish: habitational name from Brough in Harray (Orkney).
Americanized form of German   Brauch   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: English:

topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

nameMeanings.name: Katharine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Katherine , associated by folk etymology with Greek katharos ‘pure’. This is the preferred spelling in Germany. It is also the one used in the name of the American film star Katharine Hepburn ( 1907–2003 ).

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katharine de Burgh was born in 1294, in Belfast, Ireland, her father, Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Guines, was 35. She married Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond on 5 August 1312, in Greencastle, County Down, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 1 November 1331, in Diocese of Dublin, Ireland, at the age of 37, and was buried in Diocese of Dublin, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katharine de Burgh est née en 1294, à Belfast, Irlande, son père, Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Guines, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond le 5 août 1312, à Greencastle, County Down, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 novembre 1331, à Diocese of Dublin, Irlande, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Diocese of Dublin, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katharine de Burgh 1294 in Belfast, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret Guines 35. Sie hat am 5. August 1312 in Greencastle, County Down, Irland Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. November 1331 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Diocese of Dublin, Irland und wurde in Diocese of Dublin, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katharine de Burgh è nata il nel 1294 nel Belfast, Irlanda, sua padre, Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margaret Guines, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond il 5 agosto 1312, nel Greencastle, County Down, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 novembre 1331, nel Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Katharine de Burghが1294年にアイルランドベルファストで生まれた時，父Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulsterは35歳，母Margaret Guinesは35歳であった。1312年8月5日にアイルランドコウントイ ダウングレエンカストルでEarl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1331年11月1日にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリンで37歳で死去し，アイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katharine de Burgh(이)가 1294년 아일랜드 벨파스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Guines(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1312년 8월 5일 아일랜드 카운티 다운 그린카스틀에서 Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1331년 11월 1일 아일랜드 디오스스 프 드블린에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 디오스스 프 드블린에 묻혔다.

mn.Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United: Stafford, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katharine de Burgh nasceu em 1294, em Belfast, Irlanda, seu pai, Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Guines, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond em 5 de agosto de 1312, em Greencastle, County Down, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1331, em Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katharine de Burgh родилась в 1294 г. в местности белфаст, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Guines, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond 5 августа 1312 г. в местности гринкастл, коунти доун, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 ноября 1331 г. в местности диосес оф дублинь, Ирландия в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности диосес оф дублинь, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katharine de Burgh nació en 1294, en Belfast, Irlanda, su papá, Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Guines, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond el 5 de agosto de 1312, en Greencastle, County Down, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1331, en Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda.
